# Change brief

## Summary

_One or two sentences describing the change._

## Problem or motivation

_Why this change matters. The problem, goal, or opportunity behind it._

## Current behavior

_How things work today._

## Proposed behavior

_How things should work after the change._

## Affected users or audiences

_Who is affected (end users, operators, developers, support, etc.)._

## User-facing implications

_Tasks, terminology, UI/API behavior, errors, setup, migration, support._

## Internal engineering implications

_Maintenance, testing, reproduction, operational impact._

## Design decisions

_Decisions made or required, with rationale where known._

## Edge cases and failure modes

_Boundary conditions, ambiguous states, and failure handling._

## Documentation impact

_Which docs may need to change; which new docs may be needed._

## Source material

_What supplied material this brief is based on. Note gaps._

## Open questions

_Unresolved points and things needing SME confirmation._

## Human decisions needed

_Decisions that only the human can make._
